text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Everyone, I must thank you for inviting me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I feel truly honored to be having tea with you all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't have to act all formal just because
you're in the presence of a first-rate athlete such
as myself, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Please speak freely and eat as many
sweets as you like!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Here, have a seat. Let's enjoy this day together,
Satono.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Would you care for some jam cookies with your
tea? They're a delicacy, kindly sent by my
grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! So the recent charity cup was also hosted
by your family, Satono?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I helped my parents with the event, though I
didn't do much.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I'd heard stories, but your family certainly
is enthusiastic about this stuff.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your parents' names are often mentioned in my
own social circles. They're said to be quite
wealthy and philanthropic.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Goodness. I'm delighted that you know of
them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I think it's just so lovely of you to help out your
parents!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Ever since I was a child, I've been watching
my parents helping others...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So naturally, I found myself hoping to follow in
their footsteps!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know just what you mean! "A princess must be of
service!" Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A house of distinguished nobility and renowned
philanthropists...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...that went on to produce an Umamusume who is
now enrolled at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A great many must be watching you with keen
interest.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Satono Diamond in the middle of a press
interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your enlightening comments,
Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there have been a great number of
voices eagerly awaiting the release of your
exclusive interview.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really now? How wonderful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can see that the public have lofty
expectations for you indeed.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'd better ensure that I do the best job I can as
well! Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Lofty expectations, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was a splendid interview, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, McQueen! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As the reporter mentioned, your article is likely to
be read by a lot of people.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That certainly would be lovely!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...You don't happen to feel under pressure, do
you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I appreciate your concern, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I'm quite all right!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My family and all of their acquaintances have
been kind enough to celebrate my birth and wish
for my success.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Their support has always been a source of
comfort and encouragement to me—never a
burden!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it appears I was worried for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So it's not pressure you feel, but inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fulfilling one's born duties is no small feat, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know! But I embrace the challenge, McQueen!
